nodes.name: Every Day at 9pm
nodes.notes: Triggers every day at 9:00 PM local time

nodes.name: Wait for Reply
nodes.notes: NOTE: In practice, this is handled by the main Telegram Food Logger workflow detecting a 'check-in reply' context. See docs for how to wire this up.

nodes.name: Update Notion Habits
nodes.notes: Updates the Notion Habit Tracker database with today's habit completions. Requires finding today's page ID first (see setup docs).

parameters.text:
=Logged! Today: {{ $node['Parse Habits from Reply'].json.completed }}/{{ $node['Parse Habits from Reply'].json.total }} habits ({{ $node['Parse Habits from Reply'].json.percentage }}%)

Food: {{ $node['Build Check-in Message'].json.totalCal }} / {{ $node['Build Check-in Message'].json.goal }} kcal
Protein: {{ Math.round($node['Build Check-in Message'].json.totalProtein) }} / 170g

{{ $node['Parse Habits from Reply'].json.percentage >= 75 ? 'Solid day. Keep it up.' : $node['Parse Habits from Reply'].json.percentage >= 50 ? 'Decent effort. Room for improvement tomorrow.' : 'Rough day. Reset tomorrow - no excuses.' }}
